eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Albany, WY; at 7:17 PM on JUL 21, 2026 Effective until 8:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: GO! Evacuate Now! Two Mile Radius of Fish Creek Ranch & Cherokee Park Area in Albany County, WY Due to Fire GO! Evacuate Now!!
